execution_notes: Local capture can reduce vendor scope, but every local value still needs measured_at, operator_or_agent, instrument_id, and source_file provenance.
Osmolality is kept as outsourced_preferred because it commonly requires a dedicated osmometer; use a local instrument only if it is calibrated and produces traceable output.
Supplier/build records do not prove compatibility by themselves; they only remove provenance blockers.
Never enter phone photos, emails, or vendor capability replies as material evidence unless they contain real run-level measured values.
non_claim_boundary: This plan only routes work. Suitability remains false until real, non-synthetic rows pass gate evaluators and the final claim audit.
purpose: Reduce time-to-real-evidence by separating locally capturable fields from vendor-preferred fields.

rows.evidence_requirement: Calibrated conductivity for the specified H-A sample event.
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Conductivity meter export, calibration log, or display photo reconciled to run_id.

rows.evidence_requirement: 0 to 1 delamination score using the preregistered H-A rubric.
rows.notes: 0 to 1 delamination score
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Image plus scoring worksheet or vendor image-analysis report.

rows.evidence_requirement: 0 to 1 transparency estimate from a consistent imaging/lightbox method.
rows.notes: 0 to 1 optical transparency fraction
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Image-analysis export or vendor microscopy report.

rows.evidence_requirement: Calibrated pH measurement for the specified H-A sample event.
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Meter export, calibration log, or time-stamped display photo reconciled to run_id.

rows.evidence_requirement: Fractional swelling from pre/post dimensions or mass using the same method across rows.
rows.notes: fractional swelling
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Image analysis export, caliper log, or mass/dimension worksheet.

rows.evidence_requirement: Actual incubation or measurement temperature in C.
rows.notes: measurement/incubation temperature in C
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Incubator log, probe export, or time-stamped photo.

rows.evidence_requirement: Boolean precipitate/turbidity/extractables concern scored from inspection.
rows.notes: visible precipitate, true or false
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Time-stamped image or vendor inspection report.

rows.evidence_requirement: Boolean visible material shedding score.
rows.notes: visible material shedding, true or false
rows.route_label: Can be captured locally or by a simple bench operator if calibrated instruments/images are available.
rows.source_file_requirement: Time-stamped image or microscopy/stereoscope export.

rows.evidence_requirement: Measured osmolality for the specified H-A sample event.
rows.route_label: Prefer external lab unless a calibrated instrument is already available locally.
rows.source_file_requirement: Osmometer report/export reconciled to run_id.

rows.evidence_requirement: ISO date for the actual measurement or sample-handling event.
rows.notes: calendar date of the measurement event
rows.route_label: Record from supplier, fabrication batch, or chain-of-custody rather than analytical testing.
